title: Tramontina Cutlery Set with Steak Knives, 8 Piece Sharp Knife and Fork Set with Wooden Handles, ‎Camping, Kitchen, Rustic, Dishwasher Safe, 29899296
features: • Made of high quality stainless steel and plywood handle
• Ideal for barbecue buffs, party hosts and commercial caterers
• Perfect balance and razor sharp cutting edge
description: From the manufacturer Since 1911, the name Tramontina has stood for quality, high-quality workmanship and materials. Founded in Carlos Barbosa in the southernmost Brazilian state, the Tramontina family developed an internationally active group of companies that still leads them successfully. The originals of the Gauchos Steak knives and steak cutlery from Tramontina High quality steak knife and steak cutlery with unique real wood handle. Whether juicy steak, entrecôte or even fine beef fillet: the sharp steak knives from Tramontina are perfect for effortless cutting of meat. The steak cutlery is also an enrichment at the next barbecue evening, the beautiful wooden handles give the set table a rustic charm that will impress your guests.
